ladder.title: Live Ladder
ladder.body: Core + Pro active. Rankings load via leaderboard service.
ladder.bodyRemote: Firestore connected — summary rows, client cache, hourly upload limits.
ladder.bodyLocalMock: Firebase env unset — in-memory mock data for development.
ladder.noNetworkNote: Non-Pro accounts never hit Firestore on this route.
ladder.loadError: Could not load rankings. Check Firebase rules and indexes.
ladder.empty: No pilots on this shard — be first upload.
ladder.strengthKgShardHint: Ranking uses SBD estimated 1RM (kg). Re-save all three lifts and sync to refresh legacy rows.

floatingRank.cta: Tap to Jump to My Row

userPreview.title: User Details
userPreview.error: Unable to load user. Try again later.
userPreview.radarHiddenAnonymous: Pilot hides ladder identity — radar not shown.

gate.no-score: Save score to radar first, then upload here.
gate.signed-out: Sign in with Google to upload scores.
gate.anonymous: Link Google account (not guest-only) to upload.
gate.no-pro: Pro subscription required for live ladder upload.

upload.resultUnchanged: Score matches cloud — no upload quota used this hour.
upload.quotaHint: Up to {{limit}} writes per shard per hour (rolling window).
upload.quotaAfterSuccess: {{remaining}} write(s) left this hour for this shard ({{limit}}/hour); refreshes at {{resetTime}}.
upload.quotaAfterUnchanged: {{remaining}} write(s) left this hour for this shard ({{limit}}/hour); refreshes at {{resetTime}}.
upload.resultError: Upload failed. Check connection or Firebase rules.

auth.title: Sign In Required
auth.body: Google sign-in first, then upload and sync to ladder.

pro.title: Pro Required
pro.body: Pro-only feature. Upgrade to upload and join live ladder.

syncAll.hint: Upload overall and every eligible shard from your radar and assessments.
syncAll.advancedTip: Up to {{limit}} counted writes per shard per hour (rolling window). Unchanged scores skip writes and quota; better or worse scores both count. Sequential sync; missing scores, ineligible users, or rate limits skip shards.
syncAll.noTargets: No scores ready — complete assessments or save to radar first.
syncAll.summary: Processed {{attempted}} shards: {{updated}} written, {{unchanged}} unchanged, {{rateLimited}} rate limited, {{proRequired}} Pro blocked, {{errors}} errors.

assessmentSync.hint: Upload all eligible shards for this page in one run.
assessmentSync.advancedTip: This page's shards only. Skipped when scores missing, ineligible, or rate-limited.
assessmentSync.noTargets: No scores on this page ready to upload.

stats_vertical.label: Explosive Power
stats_vertical.desc: Composite plus vertical, SLJ, and sprint sub-rankings
